API Keys

Approved websites for AI research and tasks. One domain per line.

Create and restore workspace backups. Includes projects, personas, memory, and settings.

Idle Task Queue
When autonomous mode is enabled and there are no active projects, the agent picks a random enabled task. Edit the description to customize what the AI does.
